chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. C.P No. D-589 of 2022 ____________________________________________________________ Dated Order with signature of Judge. ____________________________________________________________ For hearing of CMA No.2435/2026 24.02.2026. Mr. Hamza Waheed, Advocate for the Petitioner a/w Mr. Sami ur Rehman, advocate. Mr. Khalil Dogar, Advocate for Respondent Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, D.A.G. --------------- Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate files Vakalatnama alongwith statement on behalf of Collectorate of Customs Appraisement (West), copy of which has been supplied to counsel for the Petitioner. Counsel for the Petitioner after going through the statement does not press the listed application, which stands dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE JUDGE TariqAli/PS
